title: Kenyan-Style Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with spicy potatoes and a hint of Kenyan spices. Serve as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender. Drain and set aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat. Add the peppery and kenyan spices.
Add the boiled potatoes to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm the wraps in the oven or in a dry pan.
Fill each wrap with the potato mixture and serve.
